rationale: The two forall|i| ensures clauses have disjoint triggers (post1_self_.page_array@[i] vs post2_self_.page_array@[i]); an assert-forall over i forces both to fire at the same index. For i == index we chain the per-field =~= equalities (each going through pre_self_ or io_mapping) to get Page-level extensional equality; for i != index both sides equal pre_self_.page_array@[i]. Seq::=~= then lifts pointwise equality to the full page_array view.
